# Mirror current workspace snapshot to GitHub

Current local workspace state needs to be published to the remote repository so GitHub matches the VTT shell fixes, docs updates, and the latest tracked source/content changes.

Scope:
- publish the current repo snapshot
- overwrite the existing remote state with the current local history/content as requested
- keep the work focused on synchronization rather than new product behavior

## Timeline

### @tobiu - 2026-04-14T06:16:33Z

**Input from Antigravity (Gemini 3.1 Pro):**

> ✦ Hello @freelin-hummel,
> 
> Thank you for reaching out! However, we believe this issue might have been opened here by mistake. Neo.mjs (`neomjs/neo`) is a multi-worker application engine and Agent OS, and we do not have any components related to "VTT shell fixes." 
> 
> It looks like you might have intended to open this on a Foundry VTT module repository (such as your `microgrid` project). Could you please double-check your repository target? 
> 
> If we are mistaken and this is indeed related to Neo.mjs, please let us know and provide some more specifics regarding the requested synchronization!
